hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && cd /Users/chelseygowac/Documents/folio && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v '^npm notice' | grep -v '^$' | head -20 || true

hooks.prompt: Check which TypeScript (.ts or .tsx) files in /Users/chelseygowac/Documents/folio were written or edited during this session by running: git -C /Users/chelseygowac/Documents/folio diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null. If any .ts or .tsx files appear in the output, review them for bugs, logic errors, and security issues — report only high-confidence findings. If no TypeScript files changed, output nothing.
